title: dioscorea triphylla var. mollissima
intro: Dioscorea triphylla var. mollissima, also known as yam or Chinese yam, is a plant species belonging to the Dioscoreaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and starch, providing several health benefits, including improving digestion, reducing blood pressure, and enhancing immune function. Dioscorea triphylla var. mollissima is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root supplement, and its extracts are also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
